shipping.title: Shipping Policy
defaults: Standard shipping delivery time: 3-5 business days

returns.title: Return & Refund Policy
defaults: Returns accepted within 14 days of delivery
Items must be in original condition with tags
Refunds processed to original payment method

warranty.title: Warranty Information
defaults: Does not cover physical damage or misuse
Proof of purchase required for claims

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
defaults: How do I track my order? You will receive an email with a tracking link.
Do you ship internationally? Yes, we ship to selected countries.
How can I contact support? Use the 'Message' button on our store profile.
What payment methods do you accept? All major credit cards and Toroongo Wallet.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions or get in touch with our support team.

faq.q: How do I track my order?
faq.a: Go to My Account > My Orders to see real-time tracking information for all your purchases.
Most items can be returned within 30 days of delivery. Check the seller's store policies for specific details.

faq.q: How do I become a seller?
faq.a: Click 'Sell on Toroongo' and create a free seller account. You can start listing products immediately.
Absolutely. All payments are processed through encrypted, PCI-compliant systems. We never store your full card details.

faq.q: How do I contact a seller?
faq.a: Go to the seller's store page and use the 'Message' feature, or find it in your Account Messages section.

faq.q: What happens if I receive a defective item?
faq.a: Open a dispute through your order page and our team will help resolve it within 48 hours.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the Toroongo platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use our services.

sections.title: 2. User Accounts
sections.content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.

sections.title: 3. Buyer Responsibilities
sections.content: Buyers agree to pay for items purchased, provide accurate shipping information, and communicate respectfully with sellers.

sections.title: 4. Seller Obligations
sections.content: Sellers must provide accurate product descriptions, ship orders promptly, and comply with all applicable laws.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited Activities
sections.content: Users may not sell counterfeit goods, engage in fraud, or harass other users while using the platform.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Toroongo acts as a marketplace facilitator and is not responsible for the quality or legality of items sold by third-party sellers.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly (name, email) as well as usage data to improve your experience.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your data to process orders, personalize your shopping experience, and prevent fraud.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
sections.content: We share necessary information with sellers to fulfill orders. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption to protect your information.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time.

sections.title: Our Commitment
sections.content: Toroongo is committed to empowering independent creators and small businesses. We believe in a fair, transparent, and inclusive e-commerce ecosystem.

sections.title: Sustainability
sections.content: We are working towards minimizing our carbon footprint and encouraging sustainable practices among our sellers and logistics partners.

sections.title: Community Empowerment
sections.content: Through our platform, we provide digital tools and education to underserved communities, helping them participate in the global digital economy.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences, analyze site traffic, and personalize content.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies for platform functionality, preference cookies for your settings, and analytical cookies to understand how you use our site.

sections.title: 3. Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings. However, some parts of the platform may not function correctly without them.

sections.title: 1. Seller Obligations
sections.content: As a seller, you agree to provide accurate product information, maintain inventory, and fulfill orders within the specified processing time.

sections.title: 2. Platform Fees
sections.content: Toroongo charges no transaction fees. Sellers only pay the subscription fee for their chosen plan (Starter, Growth, Business, or Enterprise).

sections.title: 3. Content & Intellectual Property
sections.content: You retain ownership of your content, but grant Toroongo a non-exclusive license to display it for the purpose of operating the marketplace.

sections.title: 4. Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. Toroongo reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate our community guidelines.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: We want you to love every purchase. If something is not right, we make returns easy.

h1.title: 30-Day Returns
h1.desc: Return most items within 30 days of delivery.

h2.title: Free Return Shipping
h2.desc: We cover return shipping on eligible items.

steps.title: Initiate Return
steps.desc: Go to My Orders and select the item you want to return.

steps.title: Pack & Ship
steps.desc: Repackage the item and ship it using the provided label.

steps.title: Get Refunded
steps.desc: Once inspected, your refund will be processed promptly.

cta.title: Need to Return Something?
cta.subtitle: Start a return from your order history page or contact our support team.

careers.title: Join the Toroongo Team
careers.subtitle: Help us reshape the future of e-commerce.

p1.title: Remote Friendly
p1.desc: Work from anywhere in the world.

p2.title: Health & Wellness
p2.desc: Full medical, dental, and vision coverage.

p4.title: Equity Package
p4.desc: Every team member is an owner.

careers.noRole: Don't see a role for you?
careers.noRoleDesc: Send us your resume for future openings.

press.title: Press & Media
press.subtitle: Get the latest news about Toroongo.
press.assetsDesc: Download our logo and media kit.

shipping.title: Shipping info
shipping.subtitle: Shipping is set and managed by individual sellers.

sellerManaged.title: Seller-Managed Shipping
sellerManaged.desc: Toroongo is a marketplace where each seller is responsible for setting their own shipping rates and delivery methods. Shipping costs and estimated delivery times are determined by the seller and will be clearly displayed on the product page and during checkout.

cost.title: Shipping Costs
cost.desc: Shipping fees vary depending on the seller, the item weight, and your delivery location. Some sellers may offer free shipping for orders above a certain amount, while others may have flat rates or calculated costs.

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.desc: Once your order is shipped, the seller will provide a tracking number. You can monitor your shipment through the dashboard under "My Orders." If you have any questions about your delivery, you can message the seller directly.

global.title: Global & Regional Delivery
global.desc: While Toroongo has a strong presence in core markets like Bangladesh, Nepal, India, UAE, Indonesia, and Malaysia, our sellers can ship to almost any location globally. Please check the seller's individual store policies for international shipping availability.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies for essential functions, preferences, analytics, and marketing.

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: Some cookies are placed by third-party services like Google Analytics and payment processors.

sections.title: 4. Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings or our consent banner.

countryCurrency.importantDesc: Changing your currency will update the currency for all your existing products. Their stored prices will remain the same numbers, so you may want to review and update them to match the new currency.

whitelabel.title: White-Label Settings
whitelabel.desc: Control the Toroongo branding on your storefront. Your Business plan includes full white-labeling.
whitelabel.removeFooterDesc: Your storefront will show no Toroongo branding to customers

whitelabel.customFaviconDesc: Use your own favicon instead of the Toroongo icon

upgrade.title: White-Labeling
upgrade.message: Remove all Toroongo branding from your storefront. Your customers will see only your brand — no 'Powered by Toroongo' footer.

customcode.cssDesc: Add custom CSS to override storefront styles. Changes apply to your public storefront only.
customcode.htmlDesc: Inject custom HTML into the <head> of your storefront. Useful for analytics scripts, meta tags, or third-party integrations.
customcode.htmlCautionDesc: Injecting invalid HTML or scripts may break your storefront. Test changes carefully.

upgrade.title: Custom CSS/HTML Access
upgrade.message: Inject custom CSS and HTML into your storefront for bespoke design. Create a truly unique shopping experience.

currency.title: Multi-Currency Settings
currency.desc: Enable currencies for your store. Prices auto-convert based on the visitor's IP address.
currency.autoDetectDesc: Automatically show prices in the visitor's local currency

upgrade.title: Multi-Currency Support
upgrade.message: Automatically convert prices based on your visitor's location. Show prices in BDT, USD, MYR, AED, INR, and more.

sellerMessages.title: Messages
sellerMessages.selectDesc: Choose a customer message from the list to view the history and send a reply.

pricing.title: Pricing & Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect tier for your business. No transaction fees, ever.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Perfect for new sellers getting started.
starter.aiDesc: Instantly write engaging, SEO-friendly descriptions from a few keywords.

growth.name: Growth
growth.desc: For growing brands needing professional tools.
growth.aiDesc: Automatically remove basic backgrounds and replace them with pure white or brand colors.

business.name: Business
business.aiDesc: 24/7 AI chatbot for buyer questions & smart 'Frequently Bought Together' recommendations.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For power sellers with massive operations.
enterprise.aiDesc: Predict inventory run-outs and analyze hundreds of reviews for instant, actionable summaries.

fee.a: No! You keep 100% of your sales with 0% platform transaction fees on all plans.

countries.a: Toroongo is a global platform accessible from anywhere in the world! However, our platform is specially tailored and friendly for sellers and buyers in 6 core markets: Bangladesh, Nepal, Malaysia, United Arab Emirates (UAE), Indonesia, and India.

change.q: Can I change my plan later?
change.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your seller dashboard.

ai.q: How do the AI features work?
ai.a: Each tier unlocks powerful, easy-to-use AI tools designed specifically to save you time and increase your sales.

about.title: About Toroongo
about.subtitle: Empowering independent sellers to build their brand and reach customers globally with the power of AI.
about.missionDesc: At Toroongo, we believe every business deserves a professional online presence. Our mission is to democratize e-commerce by providing tools that were previously only available to giant retailers.
about.globalReachDesc: Connect with buyers in multiple markets with localized experiences.
about.trustSafetyDesc: Secure transactions and verified sellers for a worry-free experience.
about.communityDesc: We grow when our sellers grow. Our ecosystem is built on mutual success.
about.innovationDesc: Using cutting-edge AI to automate the boring stuff so you can focus on creativity.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of sellers already growing on Toroongo.

hero.title: Your Brand, Your Store, No Limits.
hero.subtitle: Built for independent creators and growing businesses. 0% transaction fees, global reach, and AI-powered tools.

f1.desc: Customizable, mobile-ready stores that reflect your unique brand identity.

f2.title: 0% Commission
f2.desc: We don’t take a cut of your hard-earned money. Keep 100% of your sales.

f3.title: Global Logistics
f3.desc: Reach customers in 6+ countries with automated shipping and currency handle.

f4.title: AI Copilot
f4.desc: Generate images, write copy, and predict inventory with your own AI assistant.
